summary: AI-enhanced video processing using the NVIDIA RTX Video SDK. Provides RTX Video Super Resolution (sharpens/upscales) and RTX Video HDR (SDR-to-HDR upconversion) on supported NVIDIA RTX GPUs.

key_params.name: outputformat
key_params.note: Output pixel format — pair with HDR window pixel format for HDR delivery

common_gotchas: Requires a compatible NVIDIA RTX GPU and the RTX Video SDK installed — fails silently or errors otherwise.
HDR output is only meaningful if the Window COMP is configured for HDR pixel format and the display supports HDR.
Effect runs on the GPU but is not free — measure cooking impact on busy projects.
